description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The structure features a combination of light beige and greenish-blue roofing, with large window panels and a small patio area adjacent to a rectangular swimming pool. The property is surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn and includes a few stylized trees, adding to its suburban appeal. The front facade is defined by a prominent overhang and a clear entryway, while the rear and sides are more enclosed with fewer windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor space, and a functional, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a patio, and a pool, surrounded by a manicured lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio, pool, and a tree on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, roof, and partial view of the pool and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, enclosed walls, and two trees visible on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, pool, and clustered trees near the corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
